name: image-template-social-media-post-editorial-fashion-photography
title: Social Media Post - Editorial Fashion Photography
description: A moody, fashion-focused prompt for a minimalist studio scene with soft lighting and warm tones.

query.en: A woman with {argument name="hair color" default="long red hair"} crouching in a minimalist studio setting with a {argument name="background color" default="soft pink background"}. She is wearing a {argument name="dress style" default="fitted black dress"} and black high heels. She holds a lit match in one hand, looking at it thoughtfully, while a small decorated cake with a single lit candle sits on the floor in front of her. The lighting is soft and warm, casting gentle highlights and subtle shadows, creating a moody, editorial atmosphere.

The lighting is soft and warm, casting gentle highlights and subtle shadows, creating a moody, editorial atmosphere.
